text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, it's nice and cool in here! Geez, I never
thought I'd be barging into your room, but here
we are.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes the unexpected happens. Who could
have predicted the AC would break down
suddenly? Take your time and relax.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, take your time! Fate is one mischievous
trickster, but it has delivered you to my stage. I'd
say that's most fortuitous!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, does a day go by where she's not this
annoying? ...Hm? Where's Doto, anyway?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: D-don't worry about me! Sorry, I'll just be... here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Doto, why are you under the bed?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I-I'm trying to take up as little space as
possible!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Geez, why do you always gotta be so sad? Look
at the floor space—you'll hardly be taking up
anything, so get outta there!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeep, b-but... I don't want to be a bother!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa ha ha ha! What merriment! Why, it reminds
me of the tale of Amaterasu when she secluded
herself in the heavenly rock cave!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I will lure you out with a merry tune! La
la laaa, the rooster dances with the
Overlooord! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Shut uuup!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Taking personality into account, her
attention won't be piqued by curiosity or logical
reasoning. We should appeal to her fundamental
desires instead.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Doto, I have a delicious, frozen banana for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, as if she'll be tempted by food!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Damn it... Ugh, fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Doto, I want you to get everyone some cold
treats from the school store. I'll reimburse you
later.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay! I'll go right now!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, block off the bottom of the bed while
she's gone!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'll get the rose ice cream for Opera O,
banana juice for Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Does "everyone" include me? Oh... That's what Shakur was doing...
